title: Minecart Speed
description: Adds a command to change minecart speed.
body:
With this mod, operators can increase minecart top speed for faster rail travel or reset it back to vanilla behavior
  at any time. The change is applied globally, so all minecarts use the current speed multiplier until it is changed
  again.

  ## Commands

  - `/minecartspeed <multiplier>` to set a new global minecart speed multiplier
  - `/minecartspeed reset` to restore the default `1.00x` speed
  - `/minecartspeed` to view the current multiplier
